opdConsultations.symptoms: Hyperacidity, sour belching, bloating after late dinner.
opdConsultations.ayurvedic_assessment: Pitta vriddhi with manda-agni and irregular ahara.
opdConsultations.diet_recommendations: Early dinner, thin rice gruel, coriander water, avoid bakery items.
opdConsultations.lifestyle_recommendations: No skipped meals, reduce screen exposure after dinner.
opdConsultations.panchakarma_recommendation: Not required immediately; consider virechana planning later.
opdConsultations.consultation_notes: Patient responded well to previous pathya but relapsed after travel.

opdConsultations.symptoms: Delayed cycle, fatigue, abdominal heaviness, weight gain.
opdConsultations.nadi_examination: Kapha-Vata pattern with apana vata disturbance.
opdConsultations.ayurvedic_assessment: Kapha avarana with agnimandya and artava dushti.
opdConsultations.diet_recommendations: Millet-based meals, no late-night snacking, warm jeera water.
opdConsultations.lifestyle_recommendations: Daily yoga, brisk walk, reduce desk-time inertia.
opdConsultations.consultation_notes: Patient prefers package-based care for the next 3 months.

opdConsultations.symptoms: Knee pain, cervical stiffness, occasional migraine.
opdConsultations.nadi_examination: Vata aggravated with mild pitta overlay.
opdConsultations.ayurvedic_assessment: Vata prakopa with sandhi shoola and rukshata.
opdConsultations.diet_recommendations: Warm soups, sesame, garlic in moderation, no cold salads.
opdConsultations.panchakarma_recommendation: Janu Basti and local swedana for 5 sessions.
opdConsultations.consultation_notes: Pain increases after travel and prolonged standing.

ipdAdmissions.diagnosis: Severe cervical and knee pain requiring supervised Panchakarma.
medicine_administration: External Mahanarayana Oil application at bedtime
ipdAdmissions.diet_plan: Warm gruels, moong soup, medicated water, no refrigerated food.
ipdAdmissions.daily_progress: Sleeping better and walking with less discomfort.
ipdAdmissions.discharge_summary: Expected discharge after completion of 5 therapy sessions.

ipdAdmissions.diagnosis: Metabolic correction stay with diet and medicine supervision.
ipdAdmissions.diet_plan: Barley gruel, lauki soup, early dinner, medicated warm water.
ipdAdmissions.daily_progress: Discharged with home plan and dietary advice.
ipdAdmissions.discharge_summary: Stable for home-based care and regular OPD follow-up.

diseaseMaster.diet_advice: Warm meals, avoid refrigerated foods, add ginger and methi.
diseaseMaster.lifestyle_advice: Gentle stretching, abhyanga, and regular sleep timing.
diseaseMaster.notes: Useful in Vata dominant sandhivata patterns.

diseaseMaster.diet_advice: Reduce refined sugars, prefer barley, bottle gourd, and warm water.
diseaseMaster.lifestyle_advice: Morning walk, pranayama, and early dinner.
diseaseMaster.notes: Supports madhumeha management with Kapha control.

diseaseMaster.diet_advice: Avoid spicy fried food, prefer soft cooked meals and coconut water.
diseaseMaster.lifestyle_advice: No late-night meals and no sleeping immediately after lunch.

diseaseMaster.diet_advice: Increase warm fluids, soaked raisins, and ghee with dinner.
diseaseMaster.lifestyle_advice: Set regular bowel routine and daily walking.
diseaseMaster.notes: Useful in Vata-Kapha sluggish bowel patterns.

diseaseMaster.diet_advice: Avoid fasting, fermented foods, and excessive coffee.
diseaseMaster.lifestyle_advice: Regular sleep, screen breaks, and shiroabhyanga.
diseaseMaster.notes: Nasya support often considered based on evaluation.

diseaseMaster.diet_advice: Warm soups, sesame, and no cold exposure after bath.
diseaseMaster.lifestyle_advice: Mild mobility exercises and local fomentation.
diseaseMaster.notes: Combine with external therapies where needed.

diseaseMaster.diet_advice: Include black sesame, dates, and leafy greens.
diseaseMaster.lifestyle_advice: Reduce late nights and stress load.

diseaseMaster.diet_advice: Warm, low-glycemic meals and no packaged snacks.
diseaseMaster.lifestyle_advice: Daily yoga, brisk walk, and stress management.
diseaseMaster.notes: Supports metabolic and cycle correction plans.

diseaseMaster.diet_advice: Laghu ahara, warm water, and no sweetened beverages.
diseaseMaster.lifestyle_advice: Daily exercise and no day sleep.

diseaseMaster.diet_advice: Soft diet with coriander and cumin water.
diseaseMaster.lifestyle_advice: Avoid skipped meals and stress eating.

diseaseMaster.diet_advice: Avoid cold curd, ice drinks, and heavy dinner.
Avoid seafood, curd at night, and oily reheated food.
diseaseMaster.lifestyle_advice: Hydration, bowel regularity, and stress reduction.
